settings.heading: Your journey — from photo to sculpture

settings.title: Place your order
settings.text: Add the bust to your cart and complete your purchase.

settings.title: Upload your photo
settings.text: You'll receive a link to securely upload your chosen photo — any clear, well-lit shot works best.

settings.title: We generate your models
settings.text: Our system processes your photo and produces a selection of 3D sculpted model options.

settings.title: You review & select
settings.text: Browse your personalised model options in our 3D viewer and choose the one that looks most like you.

settings.title: We print & deliver
settings.text: Your chosen model goes to print. Your finished bust ships directly to your door.

settings.caption: Group photo crop to detailed likeness

settings.quote: Absolutely incredible. My bust sits on my mantle and everyone asks about it. Worth every penny.
settings.author: Sarah M.

settings.quote: I gave one to my dad for Father's Day. He said it was the most narcissistic gift he's ever received — and also his favorite.
settings.author: James K.

settings.quote: The detail is mind-blowing. They even captured my crooked smile perfectly.
settings.author: Maya R.
